title: Moonlight Theme | Simple Voice Chat
description:
This resource pack replaces all icons from the "Simple Voice Chat" mod.

[no updates are planned, only transitions to newer versions]
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fb00ecb84062433cacc7a756721acb3a10edf36.png)

# About the resource pack:
This resource pack changes the textures of the interface and buttons in the Simple Voice Chat mod.

It is suitable for fans of purple color and bright interfaces.

Need: Simple Voice Chat.

# Note:
Please do not install this resource pack together with other similar ones to avoid conflicts.
